root.quote: The central conclusion is that the LLM wiki idea is best understood not as a grand theory of “Loopy AI,” but as a concrete systems pattern for durable, agent-maintained knowledge artifacts.

children.quote: Most practical LLM-document systems today still follow the RAG paradigm
Knowledge is repeatedly rediscovered instead of explicitly accumulated.
insert a persistent, LLM-maintained markdown wiki between raw sources and future questions.
the system’s memory is not only the model’s parametric weights or a retrieval index. It is also the maintained artifact itself.
Karpathy’s note is intentionally informal, but it implies a strong architectural distinction
The burden of synthesis is deferred until the moment of questioning.
A source is read once, discussed, summarized, linked, and integrated into a durable artifact.
It becomes an externalized long-term memory system.
A loop can improve a local answer; it does not by itself guarantee durable accumulation.
The LLM wiki pattern sits at the intersection of three research threads
Retrieval-Augmented Generation formalized the now-standard pattern
exposing intermediate reasoning traces can substantially improve performance
explicitly modeling memory tiers and paging context in and out of a limited working window
Bush’s Memex remains the foundational conceptual reference
Karpathy’s gist defines a three-layer pattern
Raw sources... The wiki... The schema
immutable source documents that remain the ground truth.
LLM-maintained markdown pages containing summaries, entities, concepts, comparisons, and syntheses.
an operational contract... that tells the agent how to ingest, query, and maintain the wiki.
The note also highlights three core operations: Ingest... Query... Lint
read a source, summarize it, update relevant pages, and record the change.
answer from the compiled wiki, then optionally promote useful answers back into the wiki.
detect contradictions, staleness, orphan pages, missing cross-links, and gaps worth investigating.
index and log files are treated as first-class operational memory.
examined the repositories most clearly connected to Karpathy’s gist
six repositories that operationalize or extend the pattern in different directions
README-level claims... repository structure... small runnable checks
targeted sanity checks used to separate architectural claims from executable behavior.
Table 1 summarizes the comparison set at a systems-design level.
the strongest direct implementation of the compiled-wiki idea
provides high-quality local retrieval over markdown collections
translates the pattern into a full web product
introduces a two-level memory model absent from Karpathy’s note
packages the pattern as an installable agent skill rather than a software platform
applies the pattern to agent session history rather than external research documents
The targeted llmbase test run passed all 18 selected tests
executable behavior around the exact failure modes the pattern invites
immediately useful as a local retrieval substrate for markdown corpora.
validates the practical role it can play underneath a compiled wiki workflow.
Across these repositories, several components recur consistently
immutable raw sources... a maintained knowledge artifact... an explicit operations layer
The major design divergence is whether systems treat the compiled wiki, retrieval, or a memory hierarchy of both as the real substrate of agent memory.
compiled wiki vs retrieval engine
local-first vs hosted
single-store memory vs memory hierarchy
The loop framing is useful when it refers to maintenance and revision
externalizes knowledge accumulation in the same way that Chain-of-Thought externalized intermediate reasoning
Several questions remain unresolved across the ecosystem
How large can an index-driven wiki grow before specialized retrieval becomes mandatory?
When should a useful query answer be promoted into a first-class page
How should contradictions be represented
These are engineering questions, not merely philosophical ones
It is a practical systems pattern for building durable, agent-maintained knowledge artifacts.
narrower and more concrete than hype suggests. It is not a universal theory of agent cognition.
The strongest implementations converge on the same backbone: immutable raw sources, compiled wiki pages, and explicit ingest/query/lint operations.
persistent, markdown-native, agent-maintained knowledge systems have become a concrete and fast-evolving design space.
